title: Visit the Seabird and Penguin Rehabilitation Centre
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Remember that the Seabird...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Remember that the Seabird and Penguin Rehabilitation Centre (SAPREC) is right on Mossel Bay's doorstep and one can visit the centre to see the seabirds.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Remember that the Seabird and Penguin Rehabilitation Centre (SAPREC) is right on Mossel Bay's doorstep and one can visit the centre to see the seabirds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is based at Mossdustria, off the N2, in the direction of Cape Town.","html":"It is based at Mossdustria, off the N2, in the direction of Cape Town."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"SAPREC is a respected NPO, which works in conjunction with scientists, vets, the state and marine centres to treat and rehabilitate seabirds including the endangered African penguin."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The centre is open daily, except for Tuesdays and Friday mornings. Visiting times are at either 08:45 or 13:45. Visits are only allowed at these times so that the birds are not disturbed all day. The cost is R60 per adult and R40 per child.","html":"The centre is open daily, except for Tuesdays and Friday mornings. Visiting times are at either 08:45 or 13:45. Visits are only allowed at these times so that the birds are not disturbed all day. The cost is R60 per adult and R40 per child."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Booking is essential because SAPREC prefers to keep groups small.","html":"Booking is essential because SAPREC prefers to keep groups small."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SAPREC is reliant on donations from businesses and the public. For more information and to support this worthy cause, contact Carol Walton (082 364 3382).","html":"SAPREC is reliant on donations from businesses and the public. For more information and to support this worthy cause, contact Carol Walton (082 364 3382)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
